creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
Trivial patch, pulled out of original PR:

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 352735)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	x2x
 PORTVERSION=	1.27
